# Golden manifest for `goreleaser release --snapshot --clean --skip=publish --skip=sign --skip=docker`.
# Used by tests/release/phase_d/goreleaser_test.go::TestGoreleaserSnapshotTree.
#
# Sentinels (normalized by normalizeSnapshotPaths):
#   <SNAPSHOT_VERSION>  — version string e.g. "0.0.1-snapshot-abcd1234" or "0.0.0-test"
#
# Comment lines (leading #) and blank lines are stripped before comparison.
#
# Tree structure rationale:
#   - One subdir per build×platform with the unwrapped binaries
#     (GoReleaser convention: {name}_{os}_{arch}_{version}/binary, where
#     {version} suffix is only present for arm64/v8.0 and amd64/v1 variants)
#   - One archive per platform (3 archives; darwin-amd64 ignored)
#   - One SBOM (.cdx.json) per archive (3 SBOMs)
#   - Four nfpm packages (2 platforms × 2 formats)
#   - One brew formula directory
#   - One checksums file
#   - GoReleaser metadata files at root of dist/ (artifacts.json, metadata.json, config.yaml)

artifacts.json
config.yaml
metadata.json
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-checksums.txt
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-darwin-arm64.tar.gz
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-darwin-arm64.tar.gz.cdx.json
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-linux-amd64.deb
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-linux-amd64.rpm
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-linux-amd64.tar.gz
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-linux-amd64.tar.gz.cdx.json
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-linux-arm64.deb
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-linux-arm64.rpm
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-linux-arm64.tar.gz
zen-swarm-<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>-linux-arm64.tar.gz.cdx.json
zen_darwin_arm64_v<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>/zen
zen_linux_amd64_v<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>/zen
zen_linux_arm64_v<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>/zen
zen-swarm-ctld_darwin_arm64_v<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>/zen-swarm-ctld
zen-swarm-ctld_linux_amd64_v<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>/zen-swarm-ctld
zen-swarm-ctld_linux_arm64_v<SNAPSHOT_VERSION>/zen-swarm-ctld
homebrew/Formula/hades-system.rb
